name: Creamy Chicken Angelo and Pasta
recipeIngredient: 2 medium tomatoes, cut into 1/8ths and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg in a small bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, mix flour, mozzarella, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
3. Pound chicken flat between two pieces of plastic wrap. Dip each piece in the beaten egg, then dredge in the flour mixture.
4. Prepare water for boiling pasta.
5. In a large skillet, heat 3 tablespoons olive oil over medium heat. Cook chicken until tender and browned, about 3 minutes on each side. Remove to a plate and keep warm.
6. Add remaining olive oil to the drippings in the skillet. Stir in mushrooms, artichoke hearts, and tomatoes. Cook until mushrooms are tender.
7. Stir in 2 tablespoons of flour, salt, and pepper to taste. Cook for 1 minute.
8. Stir in half-and-half and sherry; cook constantly, stirring frequently, until the mixture thickens.
9. Boil pasta according to package instructions, then drain.
10. Stir Parmesan cheese into the sauce until melted.
11. Divide the sauce among serving plates. Add a portion of cooked pasta, a piece of chicken, and additional sauce on each plate. Sprinkle with chopped parsley before serving.
